p.b: This code system defines the following properties for its concepts

tr.td: A string that provides additional detail pertinent to the use or understanding of the concept
The date at which the concept status was last changed
A code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired

True if the concept is not considered active - e.g. not a valid concept any more. Property type is boolean, default value is false. Note that the status property may also be used to indicate that a concept is inactive

div.p: This case-insensitive code system https://kip.rkkp.dk/fhir/CodeSystem/VancouverClassification defines the following codes in an undefined hierarchy:

tr.td: Type A: fractures involve the trochanteric area
Type A: fractures involve the trochanteric area
Type B: around the stem or just below it
Type B: around the stem or just below it
Type B3: stem loose, bone stock inadequate
Type B3: stem loose, bone stock inadequate
Type C: well below the stem
Type C: well below the stem

title.value: Vancouver classification of periprosthetic hip fractures

publisher.value: Sundhedsvæsenets Kvalitetsinstitut with Trifork Digital Health A/S

name.value: Sundhedsvæsenets Kvalitetsinstitut with Trifork Digital Health A/S

description.value: Vancouver classification of periprosthetic hip fractures; Link: https://radiopaedia.org/articles/vancouver-classification-of-periprosthetic-hip-fractures
A string that provides additional detail pertinent to the use or understanding of the concept
The date at which the concept status was last changed
A code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired

True if the concept is not considered active - e.g. not a valid concept any more. Property type is boolean, default value is false. Note that the status property may also be used to indicate that a concept is inactive

display.value: Type A: fractures involve the trochanteric area

definition.value: Type A: fractures involve the trochanteric area

display.value: Type B: around the stem or just below it

definition.value: Type B: around the stem or just below it

display.value: Type B3: stem loose, bone stock inadequate

definition.value: Type B3: stem loose, bone stock inadequate

display.value: Type C: well below the stem

definition.value: Type C: well below the stem
